data.title: Dogfood Mode + Fiber Source Parsing for Comment Mode

epic.spec:
# Dogfood Mode + Fiber Source Parsing for Comment Mode

## Overview

Enable commenting on RadFlow's own UI (dogfooding) by parsing React fiber `_debugSource` to get actual file paths and line numbers. Add a toggle in the top bar to switch between dogfood mode (comment on RadFlow UI) and normal mode (comment on iframe/target project only).

**Current state**: Comment Mode works but returns `source: null` for RadFlow UI elements, producing unhelpful selectors like `div.flex > button:nth-child(2)` instead of `src/components/ModeToolbar.tsx:47`.

**Target state**: When Dogfood Mode is ON, clicking any RadFlow UI element extracts its React fiber debug source, providing precise `file:line` references in compiled prompts.

## Scope

**In scope**:
- Add `dogfoodMode: boolean` state to UiSlice
- Add toggle switch in TitleBar (right section)
- Implement fiber extraction: `__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__` → `findFiberByHostInstance()` → `_debugSource`
- Fallback chain: `_debugSource` → `_debugOwner` chain → data attributes → CSS selector
- React 18/19 compatibility (check for `_debugSource` vs `_debugStack`)
- Update vault comment-mode.md with current implementation status
- Disable dogfood toggle in production builds (source info unavailable)

**Out of scope**:
- Source map resolution
- Cross-origin iframe fiber access
- Arrow key component navigation
- Babel plugin for data-inspector attributes

## Approach

1. **State**: Add `dogfoodMode` to `UiSlice` following existing `devMode` pattern
2. **Toggle UI**: Add switch in TitleBar (right section, before clipboard indicator)
3. **Fiber utility**: Create `src/utils/fiberSource.ts` with:
   - `getFiberFromElement(element)` - three-tier lookup (DevTools hook → root container → DOM scan)
   - `extractDebugSource(fiber)` - traverse `_debugOwner` chain for source
   - `isReact19()` - version detection for `_debugStack` fallback
4. **Integration**: Update `CommentMode.getElementInfo()` to call fiber parsing when `dogfoodMode` is ON and element is outside iframe
5. **Documentation**: Update vault spec with implementation status and features

## Quick commands

```bash
# TypeScript check
npx tsc --noEmit

# Run dev server
pnpm tauri dev

# Verify dogfood mode
# 1. Toggle ON in top bar
# 2. Press C for comment mode
# 3. Click any RadFlow UI element
# 4. Should show file:line in popover header and compiled prompt
```

## Acceptance

- [ ] Dogfood Mode toggle visible in TitleBar (right section)
- [ ] Toggle OFF by default, persists across sessions (like devMode)
- [ ] Toggle hidden/disabled in production builds
- [ ] When ON: clicking RadFlow UI elements shows `file:line` in comment popover
- [ ] When OFF: comment mode only works on iframe content (existing behavior)
- [ ] Fallback to CSS selector when fiber source unavailable (no crash)
- [ ] Compiled markdown shows proper file grouping with line numbers
- [ ] Vault comment-mode.md updated with implementation status

## Risks

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| React 19 removed `_debugSource` | Check React version, fall back to `_debugStack` parsing |
| DevTools hook unavailable in Tauri | Use direct DOM property scan (`__reactFiber$` prefix) |
| Production builds have no source info | Hide/disable toggle in prod |
| Fiber API changes between React versions | Feature-detect properties, graceful fallback |

## References

- Spec: `~/Desktop/vault/radflow/02-Features/comment-mode.md` (lines 316-326)
- Pattern: `src/stores/slices/uiSlice.ts:98` (`setDevMode`)
- Target file: `src/components/CommentMode.tsx:83-122` (`getElementInfo`)
- Libraries: click-to-component, react-dev-inspector, react-scan patterns

## Description
Add `dogfoodMode` boolean state and `setDogfoodMode` action to UiSlice, following the existing `devMode` pattern.

**Files to modify**:
- `src/stores/types.ts:193-206` - Add `dogfoodMode: boolean` and `setDogfoodMode: (enabled: boolean) => void` to `UiSlice` interface
- `src/stores/slices/uiSlice.ts` - Add state (default `false`) and action implementation

**Pattern reference** (uiSlice.ts:16,98):
```typescript
devMode: false,
// ...
setDevMode: (enabled) => set({ devMode: enabled }),
```

**Behavior**:
- Default: `false` (dogfood mode off)
- Should persist across sessions (add to zustand persist config if not already)
- When toggled, no side effects needed (CommentMode reads state directly)
## Acceptance

- [ ] State initialized to `false` in uiSlice.ts

data.title: Add Dogfood Mode toggle to TitleBar

tasks.spec:
# fn-1-z7k.2 Add Dogfood Mode toggle to TitleBar

## Description
Add a toggle switch in the TitleBar (right section) to enable/disable Dogfood Mode.

**Files to modify**:
- `src/components/layout/TitleBar.tsx` - Add toggle in right section

**Design**:
- Position: Right section, before any clipboard indicators
- Style: Small toggle switch or icon button (match existing UI patterns)
- Label: "Dogfood" or dog bone icon with tooltip "Enable commenting on RadFlow UI"
- Visual state: Highlighted/accent when ON

**Behavior**:
- Calls `setDogfoodMode(enabled)` from store
- Hidden or disabled when `process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production'` (no source info available)
- Tooltip explains purpose: "When enabled, Comment Mode works on RadFlow's own UI"

**Reference**: Look at existing toggle patterns in ModeToolbar.tsx:143-160 (PanelButton)
## Acceptance
- [ ] Toggle visible in TitleBar right section
- [ ] Toggle reads/writes `dogfoodMode` from store
- [ ] Visual feedback shows ON/OFF state clearly
- [ ] Tooltip explains the feature purpose
- [ ] Toggle hidden/disabled in production builds
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
## Done summary

- Tests:
- PRs:

# fn-1-z7k.3 Create fiber source extraction utility

## Description
Create a utility module for extracting React fiber debug source information from DOM elements.

**New file**: `src/utils/fiberSource.ts`

**Exports**:

```typescript
interface FiberDebugSource {
  fileName: string;
  lineNumber: number;
  columnNumber?: number;
}

// Get fiber from DOM element (three-tier lookup)
export function getFiberFromElement(element: HTMLElement): Fiber | null;

// Extract debug source from fiber (traverse _debugOwner chain)
export function extractDebugSource(fiber: Fiber): FiberDebugSource | null;

// Convert to SourceLocation format used by comment system
export function fiberSourceToLocation(source: FiberDebugSource): SourceLocation;

// Check if React 19+ (uses _debugStack instead of _debugSource)
export function isReact19OrLater(): boolean;
```

**Implementation patterns** (from github-scout research):

1. **Three-tier fiber lookup**:
   - Try `__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__.renderers` → `findFiberByHostInstance(element)`
   - Try `element._reactRootContainer._internalRoot.current.child`
   - Scan DOM properties for `__reactFiber$` prefix

2. **Debug source extraction**:
   - Check `fiber._debugSource` directly
   - If null, traverse `fiber._debugOwner` chain (up to 3 levels)
   - For React 19+, parse `fiber._debugStack` string

3. **React version detection**:
   - Check if `fiber._debugSource !== undefined` (React 18)
   - Check if `fiber._debugStack !== undefined` (React 19+)

**Reference repos**: click-to-component, react-dev-inspector, react-scan
## Acceptance
- [ ] `src/utils/fiberSource.ts` created with all exports
- [ ] `getFiberFromElement` implements three-tier lookup
- [ ] `extractDebugSource` traverses `_debugOwner` chain
- [ ] `fiberSourceToLocation` converts to `SourceLocation` type
- [ ] `isReact19OrLater` detects React version correctly
- [ ] Graceful null returns when source unavailable (no throws)
- [ ] Works in development mode (tested manually)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
## Done summary
TBD

## Evidence
- Commits:
- Tests:
- PRs:

data.title: Update vault comment-mode.md with implementation status

tasks.spec:
# fn-1-z7k.5 Update vault comment-mode.md with implementation status

## Description
Update the vault comment-mode.md specification with current implementation status and all features.

**File to update**: `~/Desktop/vault/radflow/02-Features/comment-mode.md`

**Sections to add/update**:

1. **Implementation Status** (new section after Version History):
   - Core features: DONE
   - Dogfood Mode: DONE (this epic)
   - Clipboard Panel: NOT STARTED
   - File watcher integration: NOT STARTED

2. **Current Features** (document what exists):
   - Comment Mode (C key) with blue hover highlight
   - Question Mode (Q key) with purple highlight
   - Multi-select (Shift+click)
   - Alt+hover for devflow-id container selection
   - Comment badges at click position
   - Badge hover preview with delete
   - Badge click to edit existing comment
   - Hover tooltip with component name + plus icon
   - Compiled markdown grouped by file with line numbers
   - Dogfood Mode toggle for RadFlow UI commenting
   - Fiber `_debugSource` parsing for file:line

3. **Architecture Updates**:
   - State: `editorMode === "comment"` as single source of truth
   - `activeFeedbackType: "comment" | "question" | null`
   - `dogfoodMode: boolean` for self-inspection
   - Files: CommentMode.tsx, CommentPopover.tsx, CommentBadge.tsx, commentSlice.ts

4. **Keyboard Shortcuts** (verify accuracy):
   - C: Comment Mode
   - Q: Question Mode
   - Escape: Exit mode / cancel selection
   - Shift+Cmd+C: Copy to clipboard
   - Enter: Submit comment
   - Shift+Enter: New line in comment

5. **Known Limitations**:
   - Fiber source only in dev mode
   - React 19+ requires _debugStack fallback
   - No source for third-party components
## Acceptance
- [ ] Implementation Status section added
- [ ] All current features documented accurately
- [ ] Architecture section reflects actual code
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts verified and documented
- [ ] Known limitations listed
- [ ] Dogfood Mode documented with toggle location and behavior
- [ ] Fiber parsing approach documented
## Done summary
TBD
